records.ety: [L. intolerantia impatience, unendurableness: cf. F. intolrance.]

defs: Lack of capacity to endure; as, intolerance of light.

The quality of being intolerant; refusal to allow to others the enjoyment of their opinions, chosen modes of worship, and the like; lack of patience and forbearance; illiberality; bigotry; as, intolerance shown toward a religious sect.
quotes: These few restrictions, I hope, are no great stretches of intolerance, no very violent exertions of despotism.
